problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: If Shape memory alloy phase transition is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
